title: coursetia elliptica
intro: Coursetia elliptica, also known as the "Kakawate" tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines. This tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The leaves and bark of the Coursetia elliptica plant have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, where the leaves and bark are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal drink that can be consumed to alleviate symptoms.
